prestazioni: Engine: M198 3.0L inline-6 with a custom-built dry-sump system utilizing a Peterson Fluid Systems 4-stage pump and integrated oil cooler, paired with a bespoke billet aluminum oil pan designed by H&R Special Springs to prevent oil starvation during high-G cornering.

Forced Induction: Single Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Supersprint, featuring a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a custom intercooler setup with a PWR 3-core heat exchanger mounted in the front bumper, plumbed with -10AN lines and Earl’s Performance fittings.

Fuel System: Full sequential port injection conversion using Bosch Motorsport EV14 injectors (1,200cc/min) fed by a Radium Engineering fuel surge tank and dual Walbro 450 LPH pumps, controlled via a Motec M150 ECU with a custom CAN bus integration for the original mechanical fuel pump as a backup.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny/Pandem kit modified for the 300SL’s tubular frame, including extended front fenders with integrated LED turn signals, a rear ducktail spoiler, and a custom front splitter with an adjustable carbon fiber dive plane.

Wheels: Custom 16x9 and 16x12 BBS RS-GT wheels in a staggered fitment, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (225/50R16 front, 285/40R16 rear), paired with a H&R coilover suspension system with adjustable camber plates and spherical bearing top mounts.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Saddleback Leather, including custom door cards, dashboard, and Recaro SRD-E seats with 4-point Schroth harnesses, while retaining the original gullwing mechanism but reinforcing the hinges with billet aluminum mounts by Custom Cages.
